changeSet.author: esvchk
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO product (id,name, price, info, isAvailable, productLimit) VALUES (1,'Cappuccino', 8.4 , 'Small', true,null), (2,'Americano', 7.1 , 'Large', false,2), (3,'Latte', 7.8 , 'Small', true,null), (4,'Flat white', 9 , 'Small', false,null), (5,'Bumble', 9.5 , 'Small', false,10), (6,'Ice-latte', 10 , 'Large', true,20), (7,'Matcha-latte', 11 , 'Small', true,null), (8,'Espresso-tonic',11.5 , 'Large', true,null), (9,'Matcha-tonic', 12.2 , 'Small', true,null), (10,'Ice-matcha-latte', 13 , 'Large', true,3), (11,'Lemonade orange', 10.8 , 'Small', true,null), (12,'Lemonade cherry', 12.4 , 'Large', true,null), (13,'Lemonade grape', 14.4 , 'Large', false,12), (14,'Cacao', 7.5 , 'Small', true,null), (15,'Raf coffee', 9.9 , 'Large', false,null), (16,'Milkshake', 15.0 , 'Banana', true,3), (17,'Milkshake', 14.5 , 'Chocolate', false,0), (18,'Milkshake', 15.5 , 'Strawberry', true,7), (19,'Juice', 12.1 , 'Orange', true,1), (20,'Juice', 13.1 , 'Grapefruit', true,1);
